modules.name: Semantic HTML
modules.descn: Focused on accessibility (ARIA), SEO impact, and using the right tags for the right jobs (beyond just div).

modules.name: DOM API
modules.descn: Core browser interaction: Event bubbling, selectors, localStorage, and the Critical Rendering Path.

modules.name: CSS Layout
modules.descn: A deep dive into Flexbox and CSS Grid logic (alignment, spanning, and responsiveness).

modules.name: Tailwind CSS
modules.descn: Utility-first CSS framework: Utility classes, responsive design, configuration, and JIT engine.

modules.name: CSS Architecture
modules.descn: CSS Variables, BEM naming conventions, preprocessors (SASS/PostCSS), and Cascade Layers.

modules.name: React Basics
modules.descn: Component lifecycle, Hooks (useState, useEffect), Props, and Virtual DOM reconciliation.

modules.name: State Mgmt
modules.descn: Redux, Context API, signals, and server-state management.

modules.name: Forms Validation
modules.descn: Controlled vs. uncontrolled components, FormData API, and client-side validation logic.

modules.name: Performance
modules.descn: Core Web Vitals (LCP, FID, CLS), code-splitting, lazy loading, and image optimization.

modules.name: Browser Security
modules.descn: Same-Origin Policy, CORS, Content Security Policy (CSP), and preventing XSS/CSRF.

modules.name: Caching Strategies
modules.descn: Service Workers, HTTP Cache headers (ETag, Cache-Control), and Progressive Web Apps (PWA).

modules.name: SSG/SSR
modules.descn: The differences between Static Site Generation, Server-Side Rendering, and Incremental Static Regeneration.

modules.name: Testing Library
modules.descn: Testing components with Vitest or Jest and the React Testing Library (focusing on user-centric testing).

modules.name: Local-First Ops
modules.descn: Architecting apps using SQLite/WASM, OPFS for persistence, and synchronization strategies for offline capability.

modules.name: Build Internals
modules.descn: The mechanics of ESM, tree-shaking, transpilation (Babel/SWC), and why Vite's HMR is faster than traditional bundlers.

modules.name: API Patterns
modules.descn: Comparing REST, GraphQL, and tRPC: Type-safety across the wire and efficient data fetching (Batching/Throttling).

modules.name: Edge Computing & Isolates
modules.descn: Understanding Isolate-based runtimes, global distribution, and low-latency data storage using D1 or KV.

modules.name: Reactive State & Signals
modules.descn: Comparing global stores to signal-based reactivity and managing complex UI states with Finite State Machines.

modules.name: Syntax & Control structures
modules.descn: Focus on modern alternatives like the match expression (PHP 8+) vs. switch, and strict comparison ===.

modules.name: Type System
modules.descn: Scalar type declarations (int, string, bool, float), Union types, Intersection types, and the mixed type.

modules.name: String & Array Manipulation
modules.descn: Advanced array functions (array_map, array_reduce, array_filter) and multibyte string handling.

modules.name: Functions & Scope
modules.descn: Closures, Arrow functions (fn() =>), and the use keyword for capturing scope.

modules.name: Generators & Iterables
modules.descn: Memory-efficient data handling using yield and yield from.

modules.name: Error & Exception Handling
modules.descn: Try-catch-finally blocks, custom Exception classes, and the Throwable interface.

modules.name: OOP Basics
modules.descn: Classes, Visibility (public/private/protected), and Constructor Property Promotion (PHP 8+).

modules.name: Interfaces & Traits
modules.descn: Decoupling logic using Interfaces and code reuse via Traits without the 'fragile base class' problem.

modules.name: Attributes (Metadata)
modules.descn: Using native PHP 8 attributes instead of traditional DocBlock annotations for routing or validation logic.

modules.name: Data Sanitization
modules.descn: filter_var, htmlspecialchars, and secure input handling to prevent XSS.

modules.name: Cryptography
modules.descn: Modern password hashing using password_hash() and password_verify() rather than legacy MD5/SHA1.

modules.name: Configuration & Superglobals
modules.descn: Proper use of $_SESSION, $_COOKIE, and understanding the lifecycle of a PHP request.

modules.name: SPL (Standard PHP Library)
modules.descn: Useful data structures like SplStack, SplQueue, and FileSystem iterators.

modules.name: Date & Time
modules.descn: Working with the DateTimeImmutable class and timezone handling.

modules.name: PDO & Prepared Statements
modules.descn: Secure database interaction using PDO, named parameters, and preventing SQL injection.

modules.name: Transactions & Locking
modules.descn: Managing ACID properties, commit/rollback logic, and row-level locking.

modules.name: Composer & Autoloading
modules.descn: Dependency management, PSR-4 autoloading standards, and class maps.

modules.name: Testing (PHPUnit)
modules.descn: Unit testing basics, assertions, and mocking dependencies.

modules.name: PHP-FPM & Web Servers
modules.descn: How PHP-FPM interacts with Nginx/Apache and the request-response lifecycle.
